_comment: Plan 05.1-07. Flagship SharePoint Tenant Admin read-first ops. 12 aliases selected from the 15-op __spadmin__ catalog produced by plan 05.1-06. Note: product enum is 'sp-admin' (dashed), alias prefix is '__spadmin__' (no dash) — VALID_PREFIX_RE in run-product-pipeline.mjs forbids dashes in prefix literals.

rationale.__spadmin__list-sites: Tenant-wide site-collection enumeration; entry point for any SharePoint admin workflow.
rationale.__spadmin__get-site: Single-site-collection read; grounding call before any write / permission edit.
rationale.__spadmin__set-site: Single-site-collection property update; flagship write for tenant-admin workflows (lock state, owner, etc.).
rationale.__spadmin__get-tenant-info: Tenant-level metadata read; required for any tenant-wide governance flow.
rationale.__spadmin__get-tenant-settings: Tenant-wide settings read (sharing, access controls, retention defaults); baseline for governance audits.
rationale.__spadmin__set-tenant-settings: Tenant-wide settings update; kept because the most-requested admin action is toggling tenant-level sharing / access controls.
rationale.__spadmin__list-external-users: External-user enumeration; compliance surface for guest-access audits.
rationale.__spadmin__set-sharing-capability: Per-site sharing-capability toggle; frequent admin action around governance boundaries.
rationale.__spadmin__list-site-collection-admins: Per-site admin enumeration; required for RBAC / audit flows.
rationale.__spadmin__add-site-collection-admin: Site-admin grant; companion write to list-site-collection-admins for typical provisioning flows.
rationale.__spadmin__get-site-storage-used: Per-site storage-usage read; required for quota / capacity governance flows.
rationale.__spadmin__set-site-storage-quota: Per-site quota update; kept because storage ceiling enforcement is a recurring admin ask.
